description:
The quiz assesses practical PostgreSQL skills, testing knowledge of built‑in aggregates, type casting, constraints, and various lesser‑known database quirks at an intermediate difficulty with an encouraging, instructional tone. It aims to reinforce learning while providing a fun, self‑assessment experience.
Topics: Built‑in aggregate functions, Type casting, Constraints, PostgreSQL gotchas, Advanced SQL features
Audience: Developers and database professionals with basic to intermediate PostgreSQL experience who want to deepen their expertise.
